hook: Defensiveness protects ego in the short term while quietly damaging trust in the long term.
body: When every concern gets met with counter-argument, the relationship stops feeling emotionally safe.

hook: Some men hear feedback as accusation, then fight the framing so hard they miss the useful part completely.
body: Feedback is often an opportunity to understand impact, not a courtroom where you must prove innocence.

hook: Feedback is often an opportunity to understand impact, not a courtroom where you must prove innocence.
body: Listening to why something landed badly before explaining yourself can prevent a small issue from turning into a pattern.

hook: Listening to why something landed badly before explaining yourself can prevent a small issue from turning into a pattern.
body: At the next moment of tension, ask one clarifying question before you defend anything.
